description_long: This is a modern L-shaped kitchen cabinetry set featuring a combination of tall pantry, base, and wall cabinets. The cabinetry is predominantly matte black with dark wood countertops and a contrasting stone-textured bar counter section. Integrated appliances such as a cooktop, oven, and sink are visible, along with a sleek overhead range hood. The cabinetry includes multiple drawers and doors, with minimalist bar pulls for handles. The overall design is streamlined and functional, suitable for contemporary urban interiors. The set appears robust and is likely constructed from engineered wood with metal hardware and stone or composite surfaces.
description: A modern L-shaped kitchen cabinetry set with matte black panels, dark wood countertops, and a stone-textured bar counter, featuring integrated appliances and minimalist bar pulls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shaped layout, tall pantry cabinet, wall-mounted range hood, and integrated appliances.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bar counter section and the arrangement of base cabinets and drawers.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the cabinetry, with the range hood and countertop surfaces visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tall pantry cabinet, sink area, and the bar counter's overhang.
attribute_cabinet_type: L-shaped kitchen base and tall pantry cabinet set
attribute_door_configuration: combination of single door, double door, and drawers
